sql: WITH t AS ( SELECT strategy_id s, net_sol, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY strategy_id ORDER BY exit_ts DESC) rnd, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY strategy_id) n FROM copy_trades WHERE status='closed' AND net_sol IS NOT NULL AND exit_ts IS NOT NULL AND strategy_id IN ('copy-hotlead-strict','copy-hotlead-strict-hi','copy-fable-freshdip','copy-hotlead-early') ), w AS (SELECT *, MIN(150, MAX(30, n/3)) recentN FROM t) SELECT s, CASE WHEN rnd <= recentN THEN 'recent' ELSE 'prior' END seg, COUNT(*) cnt, ROUND(AVG(net_sol),5) npt, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN net_sol>0 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END),3) wr, ROUND(SUM(net_sol),3) net FROM w GROUP BY s, seg ORDER BY s, seg
